subject: Piccolo (Dragon Ball Super) — anime IP character, green-skinned humanoid in cape and turban, arms crossed
description: A tall green-skinned humanoid figure with prominent pointed ears and a bald or turbaned head stands with arms crossed in a composed, watchful posture. The figure wears a white cape with a weighted turban — the signature appearance of Piccolo from the Dragon Ball franchise. The expression is stoic and evaluating, befitting the card title's 'begrudging respect' theme. Purple-violet energy or Ki effects surround the figure. The background is a cool lavender-purple energy field.
foreground: Green-skinned humanoid with pointed ears, white cape, arms crossed in stoic watchful stance surrounded by purple energy
background: Cool lavender-purple energy field with diffuse light
emotion: stoic evaluation, reluctant respect, composed authority
